description: Skill activation triggers for Claude Fast project. Controls when skills automatically suggest or block actions.

session-management.description: Complete session-based development workflow for implementation tasks. Supports 6 session types: Development, Debugging, Migration, Review, TDD, Research.

sub-agent-invocation.description: Coordination and delegation protocols for sub-agent specialist assignments. Covers parallel vs sequential dispatch, context transfer, and agent routing.

git-commits.description: Git protocol with intelligent commit format. Covers auto-commit on session completion, commit message generation, multi-commit strategy, and branch handling.

codebase-navigation.description: Codebase structure, directory layout, agent specializations, and efficient navigation tips

new-skills.description: Guide for creating Claude Code skills with proper folder structure, YAML configuration, and troubleshooting

archon.description: Archon MCP integration for visual task management with localhost Kanban UI, hierarchical knowledge search (project docs, tasks, external RAG), and version-controlled project workflows. Only use when user mentions Archon.

claudefast.description: ClaudeFast product context - architecture, pricing, version planning, product SKUs (Code Kit, Growth Kit, Complete Kit), competitive intelligence, and product-specific content guidance. For marketing execution, use growth-kit.

growth-kit.description: Complete non-development toolkit for taking ideas from concept to market. Routes to specialized sub-skills: idea-to-product, research, marketing, seo, cro, pricing, paid, analytics, growth-loops, media-creation, crawl-cli.

idea-to-product.description: Complete idea-to-product workflow for online SaaS businesses: idea extraction, competitor analysis, GTM strategy, starter kit transformation, and expert co-founder creation

frontend-design.description: Three-file design skill: SKILL.md (creative philosophy), dashboard-visual-hierarchy.md (attention/color hierarchy), design-systems-reference.md (enterprise precision craft). Use for all frontend interface work.

analytics.description: Analytics integration with Umami and DataFast for tracking, custom events, revenue attribution, and Polar checkout attribution

documentation-research.description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation using Context7 API. Also covers skills registries (ctx7 CLI, skills.sh) for discovering and installing AI coding skills.

infra-ops-clean.description: Comprehensive infrastructure operations: VPS management, SSH, Docker, Coolify PaaS, Nginx deployments, SSL certificates, security hardening, email infrastructure (including Maillayer Contacts API), CI/CD, and cloud service setup

fumadocs.description: Fumadocs sidebar organization and content structure. Use when adding blog posts, fixing sidebar issues, or organizing documentation. Covers meta.json patterns, content collections, centralized blog-structure.ts, and common pitfalls.

dev-browser.description: Browser automation and debugging with persistent page state. Navigate websites, fill forms, take screenshots, monitor console errors, track network requests, debug web apps.

payment-processing-clean.description: Comprehensive payment processor integration - Polar.sh, Dodo Payments, checkout flows, iframe embeds, webhooks, dynamic pricing, revenue attribution

auth.description: BetterAuth implementation methodology with Next.js App Router. Covers OAuth setup, session management, cookie configuration, CSP requirements, database schema, and critical pitfalls like NEXT_PUBLIC_* build-time inlining.

email-templates.description: Email template design system using React Email. Provides consistent styling with rounded cards, zinc color palette, Inter/DM Sans typography, dark promo badges, and single CTA buttons.

postgres-best-practices.description: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.

react.description: React and Next.js performance optimization best practices. 45+ rules across 8 priority-ranked categories from Vercel Engineering. Use when reviewing React components, optimizing performance, fixing waterfalls, or reducing bundle size.

mobile-design.description: Platform design guidelines for building and evaluating apps across every major platform. 8 sub-skills covering Apple HIG (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS, tvOS), Material Design 3 (Android), and WCAG 2.2 + MDN (Web). 350+ rules total with code examples and evaluation checklists.

enforcement_types.suggest: Skill suggestion appears but doesn't block execution
enforcement_types.block: Requires skill to be used before proceeding (guardrail)

priority_levels.critical: Highest - Always trigger when matched (e.g., sub-agent-invocation before Task tool)
priority_levels.high: Important - Trigger for most matches (e.g., session-management, git-commits)
priority_levels.medium: Moderate - Trigger for clear matches (e.g., skill creation, framework context)
priority_levels.low: Optional - Trigger only for explicit matches

customization.keywords: Tailored for Claude Fast project - session-based workflow, blog content, SEO
customization.intentPatterns: Use regex for flexible user intent matching
customization.priority_rationale: Critical: sub-agent (prevents bad delegation) | High: sessions, commits, navigation, blog | Medium: skills, archon, framework context

skill_overview.session-management: Core workflow - triggers on implementation, features, bugs, refactoring, plus all 6 session types (debugging, migration, review, TDD, research)
skill_overview.sub-agent-invocation: Critical coordination - triggers before ANY agent/Task tool usage, parallel/sequential dispatch, handoffs, specialist routing
skill_overview.git-commits: Version control - triggers on commits, pushes, session completion, save work, branch operations
skill_overview.codebase-navigation: Exploration - triggers on finding, searching, understanding structure, directories, agents, specialists
skill_overview.new-skills: Meta-development - triggers on skill creation, troubleshooting, YAML configuration, system understanding
skill_overview.archon: Task management - triggers when Archon MCP mentioned, Kanban UI, hierarchical knowledge search
skill_overview.claudefast: ClaudeFast product context - architecture, pricing, version planning, product SKUs (Code Kit, Growth Kit, Complete Kit), competitive intelligence (Robin Ebers, ClaudeKit, VividKit, IndyDevDan), and content engine (brand voice, keyword strategy). For marketing execution use growth-kit.
skill_overview.growth-kit: Non-development toolkit - idea-to-product, research, marketing, seo, cro, pricing, paid, analytics, growth-loops, media-creation, crawl-cli. Triggers on marketing, GTM, SEO workflows, CRO (A/B testing, conversion optimization, form/page/flow optimization), pricing strategy (Van Westendorp, tier structure), paid advertising (Meta/Google/LinkedIn ads), analytics (GA4, GTM, event tracking), growth loops (referral programs, free tool strategy), copy editing, marketing psychology, competitor analysis, landing pages, voice profiling, lead magnets, image generation, web scraping.
skill_overview.idea-to-product: Idea-to-product workflow - idea extraction, competitor analysis, GTM strategy, starter kit transformation, expert co-founder creation, viability scoring for SaaS/digital products
skill_overview.analytics: Analytics integration - triggers on DataFast, Umami, tracking, events, conversions, revenue attribution, Polar checkout attribution, proxy setup
skill_overview.documentation-research: Library docs and skills registries - triggers on documentation requests, Context7, ctx7 CLI, skills.sh, API references, skill installation
skill_overview.infra-ops-clean: Infrastructure - triggers on VPS, SSH, Docker, deployments, server management, DevOps, self-hosting, CI/CD, database migrations, Maillayer Contacts API, contact list management, subscriber sync
skill_overview.fumadocs: Fumadocs content - triggers on sidebar, meta.json, blog-structure.ts, blog post, content structure, page ordering, OG images, turbo caching issues
skill_overview.dev-browser: Browser automation + debugging - triggers on browser, playwright, navigate, click, form, screenshot, console errors, network requests, debug, web app testing, ARIA snapshots, persistent sessions
skill_overview.payment-processing-clean: Payment integration - triggers on Polar.sh, Dodo Payments, checkout flows, iframe embeds, webhooks, billing, subscriptions, dynamic pricing, revenue attribution
skill_overview.auth: Authentication - triggers on auth, login, oauth, session management, BetterAuth, database schema, cookie configuration, CSP, trusted origins, NEXT_PUBLIC issues
skill_overview.email-templates: Email design system - triggers on email templates, React Email, transactional/marketing/onboarding emails, newsletters, resend. Provides zinc color palette, Inter/DM Sans fonts, rounded cards, dark promo badges.
skill_overview.frontend-design: Three-file design skill: SKILL.md (Anthropic creative philosophy - bold aesthetics, anti-AI-slop), dashboard-visual-hierarchy.md (research-backed attention/color guidance), design-systems-reference.md (enterprise precision craft from Linear/Stripe/Vercel patterns). Triggers on all frontend design, dashboards, admin panels, SaaS interfaces.
skill_overview.postgres-best-practices: Supabase Postgres optimization - triggers on SQL queries, schema design, indexing, RLS, connection pooling, query performance. 30+ rules across 8 categories: query performance, connection management, security/RLS, schema design, locking, data patterns, monitoring, advanced features.
skill_overview.react: React/Next.js performance - triggers on React components, waterfalls, bundle size, re-renders, memoization, server/client components, Suspense, hydration, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals. 45+ rules across 8 priority categories from Vercel Engineering.
skill_overview.mobile-design: Platform design guidelines - 8 sub-skills covering Apple HIG (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS, tvOS), Material Design 3 (Android), WCAG 2.2 + MDN (Web). 350+ rules total with code examples, evaluation checklists, anti-patterns. Triggers on HIG compliance, Material Design review, WCAG audit, platform design, SwiftUI/UIKit/Compose, accessibility audit, navigation patterns, Dark Mode, Dynamic Type, safe areas, touch targets.
